title: Sinif ve Nesne Ornegi
subtitle: Basit sinif tanimi, initialize ve metodlar.
code:
class Car
  attr_accessor :brand, :model, :year

  def initialize(brand, model, year)
    @brand = brand
    @model = model
    @year = year
  end

  def display_info
    puts "#{@year} #{@brand} #{@model}"
  end

  def age(current_year)
    current_year - @year
  end
end

car1 = Car.new("Toyota", "Corolla", 2020)
car2 = Car.new("Honda", "Civic", 2018)

puts "Araba bilgileri:"
car1.display_info
car2.display_info

puts "\nArac yaslari (2026'ya gore):"
puts "Car1 yasi: #{car1.age(2026)} yil"
puts "Car2 yasi: #{car2.age(2026)} yil"

# attr_accessor sayesinde direkt erisim
puts "\nCar1 markasi: #{car1.brand}"
car1.brand = "Toyota (Guncellendi)"
puts "Guncellenmis marka: #{car1.brand}"

# Diziler icinde nesneler
cars = [car1, car2, Car.new("Ford", "Focus", 2022)]
puts "\nTum arabalar:"
cars.each(&:display_info)
